/* Neither PDK for my local iverilog sim */
/* Not a TT standard, but we will pick a PDK. Define exactly one: */
/* For this project, see TRNG/trng_lab_core.v for conditional include of code based on the PDK. */

Tags.HoverText: Wire nets connect elements. The net-type wire is identical in syntax and function to the net-type tri. A wire net can be used for nets that are driven by a single gate or continuous assignment. Logical conflicts from multiple sources on a wire net result in unknown values unless the net is controlled by logic strength.
